normal: I'm so sorry [TARGET], but I suddenly feel a terrible fever and headache coming on. I think I need to rest at home tonight.
Hey [TARGET], my boss just called an emergency meeting tonight to prep for a big project tomorrow. I seriously can't skip it.
Sorry [TARGET], my cat suddenly started throwing up and I have to rush him to the emergency vet clinic.
I apologize [TARGET], a family emergency just came up and I have to head home right now. Can we reschedule?
I'm so sorry [TARGET], I have to cancel our date today, my boss suddenly dumped a massive overtime task on me.
Oh no [TARGET], sorry but my stomach is in terrible pain, I think I got food poisoning from last night.
Hello [TARGET], my car tire blew out on the highway, I'm waiting for a tow truck, let's reschedule.
Sorry [TARGET], I'm feeling really sick, heavy flu, and I don't want to risk infecting you.
I'm so sorry [TARGET], I have to cancel our date today. There's a work emergency that requires me to be on standby with my laptop all day.
Oh man [TARGET], sorry but my stomach has been really unfriendly since morning, I think I have mild enteritis.
Hello [TARGET], my motorcycle tire blew out in the middle of nowhere. Still looking for a repair guy, let's reschedule.
Sorry [TARGET], the weather is extremely bad with severe wind storms, I'm afraid it's too dangerous to travel now.
Sorry [TARGET], I just remembered I have a monthly dental appointment that I booked three months ago and can't be moved.
ridiculous: I'm sorry [TARGET], I just realized our zodiac signs are fundamentally incompatible and Mercury is in retrograde. My aura reader said it's too dangerous.
Listen [TARGET], I can't leave the house tonight. My ex hired a shaman to give me diarrhea every time I try to go on a date.
Hey [TARGET], my favorite outfit got stolen from the clothesline by my neighbor. I literally have nothing appropriate to wear.
Sorry [TARGET], I got into the wrong Uber and now I'm somehow at the driver's family wedding. It would be rude to leave before the cake.
Sorry [TARGET], I accidentally mistook superglue for hair pomade, now my hand is stuck to my head.
Oh no [TARGET], my mom hid my motorcycle keys because I haven't washed the dishes since the jurassic era.
Sorry [TARGET], I cancelled because my cat cried uncontrollably when I tried to leave, I just couldn't do it.
Hello [TARGET], I put on the wrong outfit—an old clown costume—and the zipper is jammed, I can't take it off.
Sorry [TARGET], I accidentally shaved my left eyebrow completely off. I'm too embarrassed to meet you today.
Oh man [TARGET], my pants ripped while putting on my shoes, and all my other pants are currently in the laundry.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't go on the date because my cat keeps glaring at me as if he's forbidding me from dating.
Hello [TARGET], I can't go out. I fell asleep with a mud mask on and now it has hardened into solid cement.
Sorry [TARGET], I accidentally swallowed chewing gum and now I feel the need to bed-rest so my intestines don't stick together.
realityBending: Listen [TARGET], an agent from the future just appeared in my room and warned me that our date tonight triggers a zombie apocalypse in 2030. For the sake of humanity, I must cancel.
Sorry [TARGET], I just slipped into a parallel dimension where the concept of a 'date' doesn't exist. I need to find a portal back to your earth.
I can't make it, [TARGET]. Gravity in my house just vanished and I am currently floating helplessly against my bedroom ceiling.
[TARGET], help! I accidentally drank a mysterious potion and turned into a two-door refrigerator. You don't want to date a home appliance, do you?
Sorry [TARGET], I can't make the date because my future self from 2050 time-traveled here to stop me from meeting you.
Hey [TARGET], the restaurant we agreed on just morphed into a vacuum void, we'd better postpone.
Oh no [TARGET], I accidentally pressed the reality reset button, so today doesn't exist on the calendar anymore.
Hello [TARGET], my real body is currently held hostage by my doppelganger from a parallel universe, please don't trust them.
Sorry [TARGET], the inter-universal matchmaking agency called and stated that our relationship could destroy the Milky Way galaxy.
Hey [TARGET], the place we agreed on suddenly shifted its coordinates into outer space, and I don't own a spacesuit.
Oh no [TARGET], the 'Undo' button on my reality is jammed, I keep getting thrown back to yesterday every time I try to leave.
Hello [TARGET], I was abducted by aliens who want to study human flirting behavior, they need me as a sample.
Sorry [TARGET], an alternate version of me from another universe came and replaced me on our date, hope you like them.
